summary: Completed comprehensive testing of header auto-hide/show and scroll-to-top button UX improvements. Desktop functionality working perfectly. Mobile scroll-to-top button working correctly. Found partial issue with mobile header hide behavior - header moves up but doesn't fully hide as expected.

ui_bugs.issue: Header partially hides on scroll down but doesn't achieve full hide effect
ui_bugs.details: Header uses translateY(-65px) instead of translateY(-100%). Should fully hide by moving completely off-screen. Currently only moves up by fixed pixel amount.

passed_tests: Header always visible on desktop (1920px) regardless of scroll direction
Scroll-to-top button hidden on desktop with md:hidden class
Header login/register buttons visible and functional
Spacer div exists to prevent content shift (h-[57px] sm:h-[65px])
Smooth animations - scroll-to-top button transition duration 0.3s
Scroll-to-top button appears on scroll up (mobile)
Scroll-to-top button stays visible after scrolling stops
Scroll-to-top button disappears on scroll down
Scroll-to-top button disappears at top of page (opacity=0)
Scroll-to-top button functionality works (scrolls to top smoothly)
Header reappears correctly on scroll up (mobile)
Header always visible at top of page (mobile)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix mobile header hide behavior: Header should use translateY(-100%) for complete hiding instead of translateY(-65px). The scroll direction detection logic is working but the transform value needs adjustment to achieve full hide effect.

success_percentage.mobile_header: 80% (show/hide detection working, but hide effect incomplete)
